segments.text: i have analyzed this pull request on
sonar cube
and its quality gate is failing
let's have a look on the pull request in
github itself
the pull request is decorated that the
quality gate
failed however i'm still able to merge
the pull request
let's add a branch rule in order to
prevent
pull requests from being merged if they
fail the quality gate
i add a rule here i will
match and protect all the branches
and i will require that the sonar cube
code analysis
quality gate succeeds
we can now see that we cannot merge this
pull request
unless we are an administrator of the
repository

fullText: i have analyzed this pull request on sonar cube and its quality gate is failing let's have a look on the pull request in github itself the pull request is decorated that the quality gate failed however i'm still able to merge the pull request let's add a branch rule in order to prevent pull requests from being merged if they fail the quality gate i add a rule here i will match and protect all the branches and i will require that the sonar cube code analysis quality gate succeeds we can now see that we cannot merge this pull request unless we are an administrator of the repository
